diagrams.title: Five-Stage RISC Pipeline
diagrams.description: Shows the classic 5-stage pipeline with IF, ID, EX, MEM, WB stages and instructions progressing through each stage over clock cycles
diagrams.purpose: Understand how instructions overlap in execution and how pipeline registers separate stages

diagrams.title: Pipeline Hazard Types
diagrams.description: Visual representation of structural, data, and control hazards in pipeline
elements: Structural hazard - single memory port conflict
diagrams.purpose: Identify and understand different hazard types that cause pipeline stalls

diagrams.title: Pipeline Performance Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison chart showing execution of 8 instructions in non-pipelined vs pipelined processor
diagrams.purpose: Visualize performance improvement and throughput gain from pipelining
